programme.title: LEGO Marvel Super Heroes: Avengers Reassembled
programme.desc: The Avengers prepare for a party with a surprise guest when Ultron crashes the preparations by using mind control on Iron Man. While trying to rescue their leader, the rest of the team discovers that Baron Stucker, HYDRA, and Yellowjacket are in on Ultron's plans. While preparing for a party at Avengers' Tower, THE AVENGERS (IRON MAN, CAPTAIN AMERICA, BLACK WIDOW, HAWKEYE, THOR, HULK and VISION) notice Iron Man acting strangely. When Iron Man volunteers to go out and get more ice, they find it odd: when has Tony every volunteered to get anything? Suddenly, ULTRON appears on a screen: he's taken control of Iron Man! To make matters worse, Ultron takes over all the versions of Iron Man's armor and they fly off! The Avengers must now fight one of their own, and they're not sure what to do! Cap and Thor lead the charge, but can't fend off Iron Man and Ultron's Minions. Meanwhile, Black Widow, Hawkeye and Hulk track down a signal that seems to be controlling Iron Man from a castle in the “Little Sokovia” section of New York. There they fight HYDRA and BARON VON STRUCKER and learn that YELLOWJACKET is the “bug” that infected Iron Man's suit for Ultron. To help break Iron Man free from Ultron's control, the Avengers call in their own bug...ANT MAN! Finally, the Avengers confront Ultron and his Ultron Minions as they attack Avengers' Tower. Ultron's ultimate plan: use all the data/stuff they've stolen to free the newly rebuilt IRON LEGION, destroy the Avengers, and control the world. Tony dons the hastily repaired Hulk Buster Armor and it's on! It's a huge battle as the Avengers try to save their beloved HQ and defeat Ultron. Will they succeed? And, more importantly, can their party be saved after Ultron tries to take down their Tower?

programme.title: The Book Of Obsession
programme.desc: The Knights are tasked with protecting the King's valuable Ned Knights comic book during the Bookingheim Knight-a-Con. But with all the costumed kids there, will they recognize the real Jestro and Book of Monsters coming to get them? King Halbert instructs the Knights that they must take his valuable Ned Knights comic book to the “Knight-a-Kon” in Bookingham. It will be the first be first prize at the Knight-a-Kon. But the Book of Monsters wants the book, too. Having devoured Ned Knightly comic books in it's down time it has become fanatically obsessed with the storyline. General Magmar suggests they simply attack the place and take what they want, but Jestro tells them they can't: everyone will be in costume and they'll be thousands of comics there. This calls for a clever “infiltration” mission (which will also allow Jestro to see the Kon, which he's always wanted to do.) So Jestro goes into the Kon with the BOM and some monsters. And it's easy because everyone is in costume Jestro, the BOM and their monsters fit right in at the convention and Clay and crew have their work cut out for them trying to separate fiend from fan. Macy keeps going on-and-on about the story in the King's comic book as the Knights keep a watchful eye on it. Robin even shows up in the “Minitrex” – a small version of the Fortrex he built just for the Knight-a-Kon. He's convinced he can win the costume competition that is the big closing event for the Kon. At the end of the Kon there's a big awards ceremony for “Best Costume.” The prize: “Ned Knightly, Knight of Knighton, Issue #1.” The BOM must get it and scheme to get closer to it during the costume contest. He's just…about…to get the book when…the impatient Magmar attacks! Everyone thinks it's part of the big show! “Ned Knightly, Knight of Knighton, Issue #1” is tossed from person-to-person-to-person in the melee. The Knights must do something, but they're too far away from the Fortrex to download any NEXO-Power. Robin pulls up in his Minitrex they can use it to get NEXO-Power! Robin wins the best costume for his Minitrex and wins the Ned Knightly Comic which he then gives to Macy…she deserves to read it.

programme.title: LEGO Marvel Super Heroes: Avengers Reassembled
programme.desc: The Avengers prepare for a party with a surprise guest when Ultron crashes the preparations by using mind control on Iron Man. While trying to rescue their leader, the rest of the team discovers that Baron Stucker, HYDRA, and Yellowjacket are in on Ultron's plans. While preparing for a party at Avengers' Tower, THE AVENGERS (IRON MAN, CAPTAIN AMERICA, BLACK WIDOW, HAWKEYE, THOR, HULK and VISION) notice Iron Man acting strangely. When Iron Man volunteers to go out and get more ice, they find it odd: when has Tony every volunteered to get anything? Suddenly, ULTRON appears on a screen: he's taken control of Iron Man! To make matters worse, Ultron takes over all the versions of Iron Man's armor and they fly off! The Avengers must now fight one of their own, and they're not sure what to do! Cap and Thor lead the charge, but can't fend off Iron Man and Ultron's Minions. Meanwhile, Black Widow, Hawkeye and Hulk track down a signal that seems to be controlling Iron Man from a castle in the “Little Sokovia” section of New York. There they fight HYDRA and BARON VON STRUCKER and learn that YELLOWJACKET is the “bug” that infected Iron Man's suit for Ultron. To help break Iron Man free from Ultron's control, the Avengers call in their own bug...ANT MAN! Finally, the Avengers confront Ultron and his Ultron Minions as they attack Avengers' Tower. Ultron's ultimate plan: use all the data/stuff they've stolen to free the newly rebuilt IRON LEGION, destroy the Avengers, and control the world. Tony dons the hastily repaired Hulk Buster Armor and it's on! It's a huge battle as the Avengers try to save their beloved HQ and defeat Ultron. Will they succeed? And, more importantly, can their party be saved after Ultron tries to take down their Tower?

programme.title: Paper Tales
programme.desc: Animation series “Paper Tales” narrate to children audience in fascinating way amusing adventures of paper animals – a moose named Aristotle and a woodpecker named Knock-Knock – in paper land where everything is made only from paper. Merry adventures come together with entertaining insets “for crafty hands” when the audience learns how to produce all cartoon characters using paper, cardboard, scissors and glue. The project is supported with the site where all flat patterns are provided with the advices how to manufacture the paper world items.This is the way spectator gets involved into a peculiar game that brings out creative work and development of many useful practical skills, distracting kids from permanent attachment to a computer. The “Paper Tales” project is a fascinating and helpful alternative to computer-oriented pastime. The whole cartoon is accompanied by off-screen narrator's text and exuberant flow of gags. Each episode is planned to last for 5 minutes (a version without insets – 4 minutes). Technique of performance is 3D computer graphics imitating paper application work.

programme.title: Ryan's Heat Experiments!

programme.title: The Cuter They Are, the Harder They Fall

programme.title: Xploration Outer Space
programme.desc: Americans have been fascinated by the cosmos for decades and rely on NASA to explore celestial bodies seen in the night sky to get a better idea of what is out there. In this series, former NASA employee Emily Calandrelli visits some of the agency's facilities, private companies and universities to speak with people knowledgeable about the topic to help "show off the coolest aspects of the space industry," to use her words. Technology, a potential manned mission to Mars and planetary tourism are some themes.

programme.title: Xploration DIY Sci
programme.desc: The "don't try this at home" warning seen on some TV shows doesn't apply to this series, which encourages the discovery of scientific concepts through experiments that viewers can reproduce in their own homes. Science teacher Steve Spangler hosts the show, providing step-by-step demonstrations of the DIY experiments that help explain scientific principles. Among the experiments presented is one that gained Spangler fame, in which he showed what happens when a mint candy is dropped into a bottle of diet soda. On the show, he explains the "why" and "how" behind the experiment and what cause the soda to react with the candy.

programme.title: Señora Acero

programme.sub-title: Alfredo entrena para matar a Sara
programme.desc: El Teca le enseña a su doble cómo atrapar a la Señora Acero, mientras ella y los suyos se preparan para acabar con esta guerra. Begoña se fuga del hospital. Atacan en el show de Aracely.

programme.sub-title: La estrategia es cazar al Teca

programme.desc: María Mercedes es una pobre joven que se encarga de mantener a su familia. Jorge Luis se casa con Diana, pero a la salida de la iglesia su exnovio le dispara.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: Santiago buscará la forma de hacer que Malvina no se quede con todo su dinero después de morir. Meche conoce a Jorge Luis de quién se enamora tras haberle pedido dinero.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: San Genis no puede esperar más y le pide a Bella que cumpla con su parte del trato y se case con él. Marimar le confiesa a Sergio que es la nueva dueña de la hacienda.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Inocencia recibe una carta de Marimar, lo que la hace pensar que regresó por Sergio. Marimar le asegura a Angélica que hará lo que sea para enviarla a prisión por los crímenes que cometió.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: María idea un plan para que la policía no encarcele a Nandito. Soraya llama a la casa de María para decirle que Luis Fernando está con ella. María sufre al pensar que Luis Fernando está interesado en Soraya.

programme.title: María, la del barrio

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: A Rosario se le otorga la libertad absoluta debido a su buen comportamiento. Meche se enfada con Justa al saber que, por su culpa, golpearon a su hermano.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: Magnolia no deja de pensar en sus hijos y promete volver a México para encontrarlos. Meche conoce a Santiago, pero él solo se comporta de manera grosera y la echa de su casa.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña
programme.desc: Valentina trata de disculparse con José Miguel, pero él ya está cansado de que siempre dude de él. Isabel se entera de que Ivana se robó el dinero y el reloj de Valentina. José Miguel despide a Rosendo, pero Leonor se opone y ambos se enfrentan.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña
programme.desc: Chuy recobra el conocimiento. Felipe y Sandra se casan mientras que Valentina y José Miguel se reconcilian. Enriqueta intenta suicidarse. Frente a Valentina, Iván le anuncia a José Miguel que está esperando un hijo suyo.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña
programme.desc: Ivana le muestra a Valentina la prueba de embarazo y le asegura que José Miguel pasó la noche con ella. Valentina le pide a José Miguel que no vuelva a buscarla y le reclama a Isabel que no le haya dicho sobre el embarazo de Ivana.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña
programme.desc: Ivana planea embarazarse de verdad para darle un hijo a José Miguel. Alonso decide hacerse cargo del hijo de Brenda y salda la deuda que tiene con Valentina: todo esto con el fin de que ella le dé otra oportunidad.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña
programme.desc: Alonso le deja en claro a José Miguel que hará todo para luchar por el amor de Valentina. José Miguel no puede aceptar que Valentina le pida que se case con Ivana. Rosendo se presenta ante José Miguel como el dueño de las tierras de los Montesinos.

programme.title: Teresa
programme.desc: Arturo le pregunta a Héctor si es verdad que Teresa podría quedar cuadripléjica y él se lo confirma. Aurora le cuenta a Héctor que se casará con Martín. Aída va a ver a Teresa al hospital y le dice que está paralítica.

programme.title: Teresa

programme.title: Teresa
programme.desc: Teresa es inducida al coma para poder ser operada y retirarle la bala que tiene en el cuello. Fernando le cuenta a Oriana que el compró la casa de Arturo para dársela a él y Teresa. Rubén sale de la cárcel.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos
programme.desc: Vítor quiere conquistar a una chica aficionada a las motos, por lo que convence a Albertano de formar una pandilla de motociclistas. Las situación se complica cuando Vítor tiene que competir en una carrera contra el líder de la pandilla rival.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos
programme.desc: Vítor y Albertano deciden organizar un espectáculo de lucha libre en una escuela primaria y así compartir su buena fortuna con los niños, pero dos de los luchadores no llegan al evento y los guapos tienen que improvisar.

programme.title: Vecinos

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: Germán intenta ser uno de los mejores porteros, pero en su intento se llevará varios vidrios rotos. Pedrito estrena lentes.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: Los López Pérez son nominados por el comité de Angangueo para ganar un premio. Roxana cuida a la mascota de una celebridad por una noche.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: Luis se preocupa por la seguridad de su hijo y Germán le ayuda a poner protecciones a los muebles. Rocko y Ale buscan trabajo.

programme.desc: Vanessa olvida que cumple un mes más de noviazgo con Fabián y decide organizar una cena romántica en la clínica veterinaria. Mientras tanto, Silvia lidia con un estudiante que se ha enamorado de ella y le envía regalos y flores a su casa.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Una vecina le entrega a Ludovico unos cachorros, pues cree que son hijos de su perro. Ludovico le ordena a Ludoviquito que venda a los perritos. Junior recupera la memoria y cree que ha sido secuestrado por una peligrosa banda.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Excelsa le pide a Federica que le preste a su familia pues sus padres la visitarán y ellos creen que tiene un esposo millonario. La madre de Excelsa cree que Ludovico la engaña.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Federica le pide a Ludovico que vayan a comer con sus papas, pero él se niega. Flavio le dice a Ludovico que ha quemado su cartucho de esposo y cuando Federica le pida algo él tendrá que complacerla.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Federica quiere inscribirse al club campestre Peluche porque una amiga de ella es miembro, pero son rechazados. Federica y Ludovico toman el expediente de una familia árabe para poder entrar.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Bibi le dice a sus papás que hay un tipo que quiere sobrepasarse con ella, pero ellos creen que es su enamorado. Bibi invita al Dedotes a comer, Ludovico y Federica quieren casarla con él.

programme.title: Rebelde

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Alma se entera por qué la mamá de Mía la abandonó. Mientras tanto, Joaquín sufre un ataque por drogarse y luego hacer ejercicio. Por su parte, Roberta arruina la cena con los amigos de su papá.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Roberta arruina la cena de su papá y finge que la golpea. Por su parte, Mía piensa utilizar las pruebas de Joaquín sobre dónde consume y vende droga.

programme.title: Rebelde

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Mía y Miguel cenan junto al papá de Mía. Por su parte, Luján es expulsada del colegio por golpear al prefecto. Diego se pasa con el alcohol.

programme.title: Rebelde
programme.desc: Mía le pide a Raquel que le haga creer a Miguel que se muere por él cuando esté solo o con Julieta Pilar no cree que Joaquín la dejó y sospecha que está embarazada Paola busca a Diego para decirle la verdad sobre su vida.

programme.title: Rebelde

programme.title: Tres veces Ana
programme.desc: Ana Leticia se entera de que Ramiro está en la ciudad. Edmundo le reprocha a Ramiro que quiera casarse con Ana Laura. Santiago lleva a Ana Lucía al lugar donde tuvo el accidente y perdió la memoria.

programme.title: Tres veces Ana
programme.desc: Doña Chana le asegura a Ana Lucía que hay otras dos mujeres idénticas a ella. Soledad se pone nerviosa porque se reencuentra con Santiago, ya que antes de perder la memoria, él descubrió la verdad sobre Ana Lucía.

programme.title: Tres veces Ana
programme.desc: Soledad le prohíbe a Ana Lucía ir a Santa Cecilia para evitar que sepa sobre su pasado. Mariano le pide perdón a Jennifer por haberle sido infiel.

programme.title: Tres veces Ana
programme.desc: Ramiro comienza a investigar sobre Ana Lucía en Santa Cecilia. Evaristo le advierte a Soledad que un hombre la está buscando a ella y a su hija.

programme.title: Pasión
programme.desc: Santiago regresa después de 4 años de estar cautivo y pide la mano de Camila. Santiago es herido de gravedad.

programme.title: Pasión
programme.desc: Don Jorge amarra a Camila para que no escape, pero ella logra salir de ahí. Días después, Camila es apresada por piratas.

programme.title: Pasión
programme.desc: Camila sigue desaparecida y, junto con otras mujeres, es prisionera de un grupo de piratas. Vasco y Úrsula tienen un encuentro romántico. Camila se hace amiga de Jimena.

programme.title: Pasión
programme.desc: Santiago se entera de la desaparición de Camila. Al llegar a puerto, Jimena y Camila son puestas en venta.

programme.title: Miente y serás feliz
programme.desc: La franqueza de un viudo le provoca problemas con la gente que lo rodea: su hija, sus vecinos y la chismosa del pueblo.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: A río revuelto, ganancia de pescadores
programme.desc: Una joven es acusada en la escuela de publicar fotos desnuda en internet, pero fue extorsionada por un compañero de escuela que pertenecía a una red de pornografía infantil.

programme.sub-title: Mientras más profundo es el río, menos ruido hace
programme.desc: La madre de Paty es una actriz famosa. Por la presión que ejercen sobre ella, se vuelve anoréxica y termina en el hospital.

programme.sub-title: A buen sueño no hay cama dura
programme.desc: Sandra es apasionada del fútbol, pero su mamá quiere que se dedique al modelaje. Sandra demuestra que es capaz de cumplir su sueño.

programme.sub-title: La avaricia es mar sin fondo y sin orillas
programme.desc: Luego del asesinato de su padre, Jerónimo comienza a investigar obsesivamente hasta dar con los responsables, sin pensar que se trata de su hermano, la novia de éste y un delincuente.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho
programme.sub-title: De mujer que es madre, nunca nadie mal hable
programme.desc: Una jardinera se encuentra por casualidad con un joven y su madre cuando visitaban la tumba de su padre. El joven descubrirá que fue robado cuando tenía dos años y pronto se reencontrará con su madre biológica.

programme.title: Como dice el dicho

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: Varios talentos de las temporadas anteriores de Pequeños Gigantes regresan para unirse a los participantes y ayudarlos en su prueba de canto.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: El grupo Bronco llega al escenario para cantar sus más grandes éxitos. Los Pequeños Gigantes realizan espectaculares actuaciones en la pista de baile.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: Los pequeños bailarines se enfrentan en una prueba de mambo. El cantante Christian Nodal se presenta en el escenario. Albertano sorprende en el programa.

programme.title: Pequeños gigantes
programme.desc: La cantante internacional Filippa Giordano se presenta en el escenario. Los capitanes se enfrentan en una prueba de preguntas y respuestas. Se vive la segunda eliminación de la competencia.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Una familia con una vida normal cambia de la noche a la mañana cuando el pequeño Oliver es diagnosticado con una agresiva enfermedad. Los padres de Oliver son notificados y comienza el calvario de 36 horas.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Teresa Rodríguez relata la historia de la recaptura de Joaquín Guzmán Loera 'El Chapo'. Desde el escape de 'El Chapo' junto con 'El Cholo' de la casa en Culiacán hasta la captura de ambos delincuentes en un hotel de paso.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Hay veces que las familias son separadas por situaciones fortuitas. Alejandro Muñoz es un periodista cuyo propósito en su programa de televisión es reunir a familias separadas por diversos motivos. Él cuenta algunas de sus experiencias.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: La patrulla fronteriza de Estados Unidos tiene registro de que la mayoría de indocumentados que cruzan la frontera son centroamericanos. Dentro de esta población hay muchos menores de edad que viajan solos para reunirse con sus familiares.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: En Nueva York existe una importante cantidad de población inmigrante proveniente de Casa Blanca, un pueblo del estado de Puebla en México. Ellos desean reunirse de nuevo con sus padres después de muchos años de no verlos.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: La inmigración a Estados Unidos se ha convertido en una industria con un enfoque monetario. En este episodio se dan a conocer las implicaciones monetarias además de los estragos emocionales que deja en los inmigrantes.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Salmo 100 es una organización que lleva mensajes de paz y reconciliación. Las historias de Daniel, Adrián o Giovanni son ejemplos de que usa Salmo 100 para ayudar a más personas que quieren salir del mundo del crimen organizado en la frontera.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Las redadas que realizan los agentes de migración han hecho que el miedo tome muchos vecindarios de Estados Unidos. Las historias de quienes han sido deportados son contadas. También, las historias de quienes viven temerosos de ser deportados.

programme.title: Aquí y ahora
programme.desc: Un programa de reconocida trayectoria, en el que se presentan especiales de reportajes de investigaciones periodísticas de temas de actualidad, de vanguardia, de opinión pública y de problemáticas sociales, este además tiene su faceta ligera y algunas veces incluye episodios con entrevistas exclusivas de los famosos y personajes que están haciendo noticia. El show despliega un panorama actual de los hechos más importantes del mundo y especialmente de las comunidades iberoamericanas, realizado por un grupo de periodistas reconocidos e importantes, cuyos trabajos profesionales han sido amplios, ellos tienen años de experiencia en el área del periodismo y son muy profesionales a la hora de presentar sus reportajes, teniendo en cuenta siempre la responsabilidad que tienen ante el público.

programme.title: Bootsy Collins
programme.sub-title: Casper the Funky Ghost: Bootsy Collins à Vienne
programme.desc: Bootsy Collins, famed for playing with George Clinton and his very own Rubber Band, is used to playing syncopated, hard and relentlessly rhythmic music. With this unique style Bootsy was a major influence on the development of funk. Now in his 60s, the bassist seems animated by a new energy that reflects his new work on the album ‘Tha Funk Capitol of the World'. With this album, Bootsy Collins pays tribute to the artists with whom he worked during his frantic career: from James Brown and Parliament-Funkadelic to Fatboy Slim. During this concert, recorded at the festival Jazz à Vienne, Bootsy maintains that same energy, giving a spectacular show.

programme.title: Mike Stern
programme.sub-title: Mike Stern & Didier Lockwood: Jazz à Vienne
programme.desc: Guitarist Mike Stern and violin player Didier Lockwood sharing a stage: that promises a good show! After playing for years with Blood, Sweat & Tears, Mike Stern landed a gig with drummer Billy Cobham and then broke through with Miles Davis' comeback band in the 1980s. Didier Lockwood played in jazz fusion band Magma during the 1970s and is known for his use of electric amplification and experimentation. Together they perform a unique duo concert at the beautiful antique theatre in Vienne, France.

programme.title: Art Farmer, Jim Hall, Steve Swallow & Pete La Roca
programme.sub-title: The Art Farmer Quartet live In England
programme.desc: Art Farmer: Live in '64 highlights an amazing one-hour concert featuring the great flugelhornist in his prime. Farmer's band includes legendary guitarist Jim Hall (fresh from Sonny Rollins' band), drummer Pete LaRoca, and Steve Swallow on bass. The legendary ensemble plays both standards and originals with ease and finesse and highlights why Farmer was considered one of the most innovative horn players in all of jazz.

programme.title: Bill Evans
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Michael Blicher
programme.sub-title: Blicher Hemmer Gadd - A Music documentary
programme.desc: Award-winning saxophonist Michael Blicher, Hammond wizard Dan Hemmer and legendary drummer Steve Gadd joined forces in 2014 to celebrate their shared love for Hammond-organ soul jazz. The band, which tours extensively throughout the world, has released several albums. Their third album, which was released in November 2019, features U.K. vocalist Paul Carrack on the soulful ballad 'The First One To Know'.

programme.title: Kenny Barron
programme.desc: Pianist Kenny Barron's June 27, 2019 appearance at the Alfa Jazz Festival in Ukraine's Lviv was a celebration of sublime jazz virtuosity. The revered elder statesmen of jazz piano brought his regular working trio of Kiyoshi Kitagawa (bass) and Jonathan Blake (drums), augmented by stellar jazzman Marcus Strickland (tenor saxophone) and young lion Riley Mulherkar (trumpet). Their seamless blend of classic bebop and modern explorations spoke of a deep, emotive connection to each note, captivating the Ukrainian audience with lyrical improvisations during this unforgettable concert.

programme.title: Miles Davis
programme.desc: American trumpeter Miles Davis (1926-1991) was a pioneering jazz musician from the late 1940s to the late 1980s. His influence on 20th century music is hard to overstate, as he trailblazed bebop, cool jazz, hardbop, modal jazz, and electronic music. On October 11, 1964, Miles Davis performed at Teatro Dell'Arte in Milan. With tenor saxophonist Wayne Shorter, pianist Herbie Hancock, bassist Ron Carter and drummer Tony Williams, Davis performed Autumn Leaves, My Funny Valentine, All Blues, All of You, and Joshua.

programme.title: John Coltrane
programme.desc: An extraordinary collection of clips in all jazz genres from the most beautiful concerts and the most special festivals, performed by the finest jazz musicians.

programme.title: Dizzy Gillespie, Tony Coe, Derek Humble & Billy Mitchell
programme.desc: American jazz trumpeter, composer, and bandleader Dizzy Gillespie (1917-1993) was one of the seminal figures of the bebop movement. He fuses all musical forms rooted in African culture, such as music from Cuba, Latin America and the Caribbean, into his music. On November 4, 1970 he played a concert in Denmark with the Kenny Clarke/Francy Boland Big Band, performing Con Alma, Brother K, Now Hear My Meanin', Manteca, Let Me Outta Here, and Things Are Here.

programme.title: George Benson & Earl Klugh
programme.sub-title: George Benson and Earl Klugh - North Sea Jazz
programme.desc: The North Sea Jazz Festival is the largest indoor music festival in the world, known globally as the event where the past, present and future of jazz are featured within three days. Next to a firm base of jazz as the festival's staple music genre, many others, such as blues, soul, funk, or hip hop, pass by. In 1987, prominent guitarist George Benson brought his band to kick off day three of the North Sea Jazz Festival in The Hague. Joining him to play songs from their joint album "Collaborations" was Grammy award–winning acoustic guitarist Earl Klugh.

programme.title: Ivan Fischer & Budapest Festival Orchestra
programme.sub-title: Works by Bach, Bartók, and Brahms
programme.desc: Iván Fischer leads his Budapest Festival Orchestra in an exciting concert program consisting of works by J. S. Bach, Béla Bartók, and Johannes Brahms. The program opens with Bach's Brandenburg Concerto No. 3 in G major, BWV 1048. This is followed by one of Bartók's best-known pieces: Music for strings, percussion and celesta. Remarkable is the work's instrumentation: Bartók divided the strings into two groups that are placed on opposite sides of the stage, to create antiphonal effects. The program ends with Brahms's Symphony No. 3 in F major, Op. 90. This performance was recorded at the Béla Bartók National Concert Hall in Budapest, Hungary, on December 4, 2017.

programme.title: Sir Simon Rattle & London Symphony Orchestra
programme.desc: Sir Simon Rattle conducts the London Symphony Orchestra in a concert performance recorded on March 18, 2021, at St. Luke's in London. The program features Dvořák's Scherzo Capriccioso and selections from Act II of Tchaikovsky's The Nutcracker.

programme.title: Julie Berthollet, Camille Berthollet, Guillaume Vincent & Ensemble Appassionato
programme.sub-title: Berthollet Sisters at Théâtre des Champs-Élysées
programme.desc: For this exceptional recital, recorded in 2019 at the Théâtre des Champs-Élysées, Camille (cello) and Julie Berthollet (violin) are accompanied by pianist Guillaume Vincent and the Ensemble Appassionato under the direction of Mathieu Herzog. The two musical sisters have chosen a repertoire which crosses genres and eras to explore the expressive palette of the violin and cello, from the baroque of Vivaldi to the jazzy notes of Django Reinhardt and Stéphane Grapelli. Among the works on the program are Brahms Hungarian Dances No. 5 and No. 6, Karl Jenkins' Palladio, 'Theme from Forrest Gump' by Alan Silvestri, Schumann's Piano Quintet, Op. 44, The Red Violin by Corigliano, Hungarian Rhapsody, op. 68 by Popper, Minor Swing by Reinhardt/Grappeli and Csárdás by Monti.

programme.title: Russian National Orchestra & Mikhail Pletnev
programme.desc: Russian conductor and pianist Mikhail Pletnev leads the Russian National Orchestra in performances of Nikolai Rimsky-Korsakov's music. On the program are Suite for Orchestra after the opera 'The Legend of the Invisible City of Kitezh and the Maiden Fevroniya', and Musical Pictures for Orchestra from the opera 'The Tale of Tsar Saltan'. Part of the latter is the famous 'Flight of the Bumblebee'. This concert was recorded at the Tchaikovsky Concert Hall of the Russian Philharmonic Society in 2017.

programme.title: Martha Argerich
programme.desc: Cinematic classical clips and energizing concert pieces featuring up-and-coming artists.

programme.title: Jos van Immerseel, Anima Eterna Brugge, Claron McFadden & Bart Van Caenegem
programme.desc: Belgian conductor Jos van Immerseel leads Anima Eterna Brugge in a concert program dedicated to American composer George Gershwin. The program opens with Gershwin's symphonic suite Catfish Row (arr. Steven D. Bowen) which is based upon music from his famous opera Porgy and Bess (1935). This is followed by the well-known tone poem An American in Paris (1928). After, soprano Claron McFadden joins the orchestra, presenting a selection of Gershwin's classic jazz songs, including ‘The man I love' (1924-27), ‘I got rhythm' (1930), and ‘By Strauss' (1936). She also performs ‘My man's gone now' and ‘Summertime' from Porgy and Bess. The concert ends with Gershwin's celebrated Rhapsody in Blue, with Bart Van Caenegem as featured pianist. This performance was recorded at Concertgebouw Brugge, Belgium, on March 3, 2017.

programme.title: Paul Simon
programme.desc: During the first leg of Paul Simon's triumphant, 2011 U.S. tour, he thrilled hometown fans with a special club performance at New York City's historic Webster Hall. The show presents this iconic artist working at the peak of his artistic and creative powers in an unusually intimate setting. The 20-song, 90-minute set list was drawn from his legendary career and includes several songs that haven't been performed live in many years. "Kodachrome," "Mother and Child Reunion," "Gone At Last" and "The Obvious Child" are just some of the highlights as well as songs from Simon's most recent album, 2011's So Beautiful or So What (Hear Music/Concord Music Group) including "Dazzling Blue," "Rewrite," "The Afterlife" and the album's propulsive title track.

programme.title: The Black Keys
programme.desc: The Austin City Limits Music Festival is an annual music festival that takes place at Zilker Park in Austin, Texas. The festival features more than 130 bands on eight stages for three days.

programme.title: Black Sabbath
programme.desc: Birmingham in the late 1960s was an industrial city, packed with music groups. At its height, the New Musical Express had reported 500 on its bustling circuit and from two of these groups, Black Sabbath was formed. The Beatles would be a key influence for Ozzy, but bassist Geezer Butler also shaped Ozzy's work, through his lyrics After signing to Vertigo Records in 1970, the four piece used their distinctive sound to full effect for their self-titled debut album, Black Sabbath. Black Sabbath became a commercial success, entering the UK top 10 and the US charts. In it's first year it sold one million copies. Keen to build on the success, the band entered the studio just four months after releasing their debut. The title track, Paranoid, would lead the new album. Featuring archive material, music videos “PARANOID” “EVIL WOMAN” and, exclusive insights from music critics and journalists JOHN AIZLEWOOD (Evening Standard), DANIELLE PERRY (XFM), WILL HODGKINSON (The Times) & CAMILLA PIA (BBC Radio 6)

programme.title: Iron Maiden
programme.desc: With sales near the 90 million mark and a career spanning over four decades, Iron Maiden are giants of the metal scene. The band grew out of London's East End in the early 70s when bassist Steve Harris tried to find the right musicians to suit his ambitious musical ideas. ‘The Number of the Beast' made Iron Maiden global superstars.To date it has sold 14 million copies. Iron Maiden continue to be one of the world's biggest metal acts. Their 2010 release, ‘The Final Frontier' entered at Number one in 28 countries. Featuring archive material, music videos – “RUNNING FREE” “RUN TO THE HILLS” and, exclusive insights from music critics and journalists JOHN AIZLEWOOD (Evening Standard), DANIELLE PERRY (XFM), WILL HODGKINSON (The Times) & CAMILLA PIA (BBC Radio 6)

programme.title: Flying Over Spanish Islands
programme.desc: In their first collaboration, cinematographer Stefan Zimmerman and Nature Relaxation™ producer David Huting present "Above the Spanish Islands." This 50-minute 4K aerial film captures Mallorca and the Canary Islands, set to ambient music by Diamans, Electus, and Michael St. Laurent.

programme.title: Flying Over Iceland
programme.desc: "Flying Over Iceland: Part I" provides a soothing aerial journey through eastern Iceland's fjords and valleys, starting at sunrise in Brei_dalsvik. Enjoy views of mists, a waterfall, and the Brei_dals' river, set to nature sounds and music by The Cynic Project, showcasing East Iceland's beauty.

programme.title: Flying Over Iceland 2
programme.desc: "Flying Over Iceland II: Summer in the Golden Circle" presents a serene aerial view of Iceland's south coast, starting at Skogafoss and moving to Vik, with black sand beaches, cliffs, and Vatnajökull glacier. Filmed in 2020, this 1-hour film features local wildlife and immersive music.

programme.title: Flying Over Oahu
programme.desc: "Flying Over Oahu" offers a 97-minute aerial journey over Oahu's iconic coastlines with nature sounds and music by Alex Smith (The Cynic Project). From Waikiki Beach to Turtle Bay, enjoy breathtaking 4K landscapes, ending with a stunning Waikiki sunset.

programme.title: Flying Over Kauai
programme.desc: "Flying Over Kauai" provides a soothing aerial journey over Hawaii's Garden Island, featuring the lush NaPali Coast, waterfalls, canyons, and beaches. Paired with new music by The Cynic Project and nature sounds, this 4K film offers a visually and sonically immersive experience.
